title: Garry Winogrand: All Things are Photographable
original_title: Garry Winogrand: All Things Are Photographable
overview: Freyer Artist. Iconoclast. Man of his time. All Things are Photographable is a revealing documentary portrait of the life and work of acclaimed photographer Garry Winogrand – the epic storyteller in pictures of America across three turbulent decades.
